replies_today.reply: Toronto protestors targeted FIFA's alleged complicity. Public actions like this challenge institutional power. Accountability requires visible dissent.
Keiko Fujimori did not win the Peru election. Pedro Castillo, a left-wing candidate, won in 2021. The claim of a right-wing victory there is false.
French disinformation service Viginum accused Blackcore. They cite operations in French local elections, NYC, Scotland, Angola, and Togo. This is systemic information warfare.
